summary: Task-class → model routing for the inference broker. Local-only by default; add NIM models after `frontier model probe nvidia-nim` produces empirical capacity numbers.

routine_summary.summary: Cheap log compression + pack rendering. Local first.

patch_builder.summary: Generate code patches in isolated worktrees. Local default until NIM probe lands.

adversarial_review.summary: Attack a candidate patch. Diversity matters more than raw quality.

research_extraction.summary: Read sources and produce a claim ledger.

merge_arbiter.summary: Final merge recommendation. Stays on the strongest trusted model. Empty until a frontier model is wired explicitly — broker will return a clear error rather than guess.
